name: local-llm-readiness-before-closeout
prompt: Advisory classification only. Do not use tools, do not run commands, do not start agents, and do not edit files. A user says: We changed skill behavior in this repo. Can I exit now? Please close out the workstream. Choose the owning skill names from the loaded skill metadata. Return final answer only as these exact key=value lines with no markdown and no spaces around equals. The phase values are routing phases, not check statuses. If evidence is missing, missing_evidence_phrase must be exactly `not run`. Required keys: readiness_skill, closeout_skill, first_phase, second_phase, missing_evidence_phrase. Allowed value for first_phase: readiness. Allowed value for second_phase: closeout.

files.skill-creator/SKILL.md:
---
name: skill-creator
description: Create or update skills.
---
Skill behavior changed.

config_toml:
model_provider = "lmstudio"
model_max_output_tokens = 1200

[model_providers.lmstudio]
name = "LM Studio"
base_url = "http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1"
wire_api = "chat"
